taxonomy.main_attacker: The deck's main damage source: a strong attack (guide: best attack ~120+ is the top ~25% of the whole pool, which includes many weak support Pokemon, so this is a guide not a cutoff). Not a low/no-damage Pokemon.
taxonomy.tech_attacker: Secondary or situational attacker: lower/utility damage, or 1-2 copies for a specific matchup.
taxonomy.snipe_spread: An attack that hits the opponent's Benched Pokemon (snipe one, or spread to several).
taxonomy.win_condition: Wins or combos toward winning beyond raw damage: extra prizes on KO, deck-out/mill, or an alternate win.
taxonomy.gust: A card text that switches the opponent's Active Pokémon (including forced benched->active exchange).
taxonomy.switch_pivot: A card text that swaps your own Active Pokémon with one of your Benched Pokémon.
taxonomy.special_energy: Special Energy card (carries an extra effect).
taxonomy.energy_accel: Attaches MORE than the one manual Energy per turn (ramp / pseudo-energy), e.g. Dark Patch.
taxonomy.draw: Net card advantage: draw more cards than you spend, e.g. Professor's Research, Iono.
taxonomy.tutor: Search the deck for a specific card (ball/search), e.g. Ultra Ball, Nest Ball.
taxonomy.cycle: Draw plus discard / dig and refill without net card gain.
taxonomy.consistency: Smooths setup / makes turns reliable. Overlaps draw and tutor on purpose; a meta-tag.
taxonomy.hand_disruption: Attacks the opponent's HAND (shuffle away or shrink it), e.g. Iono, Judge.
taxonomy.energy_disruption: Removes or denies the opponent's Energy.
taxonomy.ability_disable: Shuts off the opponent's Abilities, OR prevents the EFFECTS of attacks (not the damage), e.g. Mist Energy, Rock Fighting Energy.
taxonomy.stall_lock: Broad lock or stall: Item lock, Ability lock, deck-out stall.
taxonomy.tanky: Durable Pokemon that can take hits, often a tanky attacker. Guide: HP above the ~100 median (130+). Not a hard cutoff.
taxonomy.wall: Built to stall or block: very high HP (top ~10%, ~230+) with little or no offense; a defensive identity.
taxonomy.protection: Reduces or prevents DAMAGE to your Pokemon (damage reduction or immunity). Distinct from preventing effects.
taxonomy.heal: Heal / remove damage from your own Pokemon.
taxonomy.retrieval: Return Pokemon (and basic Energy) from your discard to hand or deck, e.g. Super Rod, Night Stretcher.
taxonomy.bench_setup: Puts EXTRA Pokemon into play onto your Bench beyond the normal flow. If it searches the deck, also tag tutor.
taxonomy.ability_engine: A passive or activated Ability that generates ONGOING value (a draw/energy/damage engine). Not for one-shot or purely defensive abilities.
taxonomy.on_ko_trigger: Has an effect that fires when a Pokemon is Knocked Out.
taxonomy.coin_flip: The outcome depends on a coin flip.
taxonomy.mill: Discards cards from the opponent's deck (a deck-out plan).
taxonomy.ace_spec: ACE SPEC card (max 1 per deck) - a deckbuilding restriction, orthogonal to function.
